name: serena-mcp
description: Repo-aware Serena MCP plugin for workspace inspection and code navigation.

interface.longDescription: Adds Serena as a local MCP server and ships a small skill for symbol search, file discovery, and code navigation before falling back to manual shell inspection.
defaultPrompt: Use Serena to find where this symbol is defined.
Inspect this repo with Serena before shell fallbacks.
Map the files involved in this feature with Serena.
